title: Refactor to DDD Architecture
description: Driven by Domain instead of MVC

title: Add APIs
description:
Manifest: /api/v1/management-service/trips/{tripId}/manifest

Vehicle reassignment: /api/v1/management-service/trips/{tripId}/reassign-vehicle

Incident: /api/v1/management-service/trips/{tripId}/incidents /api/v1/management-service/trips/{tripId}/incidents /api/v1/management-service/incidents/{incidentId}/resolve

Booking close policy: /api/v1/management-service/routes/{routeId}/booking-policy /api/v1/management-service/trips/{tripId}/booking-policy

Delay / cancel: /api/v1/management-service/trips/{tripId}/delay
/api/v1/management-service/trips/{tripId}/cancel
